case_title: FATIMA TORREZ VS. VICENTA PEREZ et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY TORREZ, FATIMA AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, VICENTA CENTENO, MARINA HERRERA, LUCIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORREZ, FATIMA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-04-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERRERA, LUCIO

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORREZ, FATIMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, VICENTA CENTENO, MARINA HERRERA, LUCIO $445.80 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $445.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY THE THREE NAMED DEFENDANTS WHO EACH WAIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS IN OPEN COURT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRTER MANTI HENRIQUEZ PRESENT AND BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ ALSO ASSIST THE DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
